overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking through a sunlit Parisian plaza toward the Arc de Triomphe. The environment features historic Haussmann-style architecture and tree-lined avenues rendered in a game engine, with the character exploring the open pedestrian space.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined avenue with historic Haussmann buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide paved avenue with a historic building on the right side

entered.detail: ornate stone building with multiple windows and classic Parisian architecture
large triumphal arch monument visible in the distance at the end of the avenue
row of green leafy trees lining the left side of the avenue
row of green leafy trees lining the right side of the avenue

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide, tree-lined avenue with a grand historic building on the right. The Arc de Triomphe stands prominently in the distance ahead, and the scene is bathed in bright afternoon sunlight with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching the Arc de Triomphe

events.description: sun glare intensifies as the character walks directly toward the sun's position

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward toward the Arc de Triomphe as the building on the right recedes from view

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking toward the Arc de Triomphe as the historic building passes out of view on the right. The sun glare increases significantly, and the monument grows larger in the frame as the distance closes.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza near the Arc de Triomphe with surrounding historic buildings

events.description: character makes a sharp right turn and begins walking in a new direction around the plaza

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking around the plaza, changing the perspective of the Arc de Triomphe from ahead to the side

entered.detail: large dark stone building with classical architecture appearing on the left side
light-colored ornate historic building with detailed facade

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and walks around the open plaza, revealing new historic buildings on the left and right. The Arc de Triomphe shifts from the center to the right side of the frame as the character changes direction, exploring the monument's surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: direct approach to the Arc de Triomphe monument

agents.ego_description: walking directly toward the Arc de Triomphe monument, approaching the detailed stone carvings on its facade

segments.scene_description: The character makes a final approach to the Arc de Triomphe, walking directly toward the monument's grand archway. The surrounding buildings pass out of view as the focus centers on the detailed stone monument filling the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit Parisian avenue that gradually narrows its focus from a wide cityscape to the imposing scale of the Arc de Triomphe. It begins with the character walking along a tree-lined boulevard beside a grand historic building, with the monument standing prominently under a clear afternoon sky. As the character advances, the building on the right passes out of view and the sun glare intensifies, causing the monument to grow larger and more dominant in the frame. The scene then shifts as the character turns right to navigate the open plaza, revealing new historic architecture on both sides while the Arc de Triomphe slides toward the right of the frame. Finally, the camera makes a direct approach toward the grand archway, leaving the surrounding buildings behind as the detailed stone monument fills the entire field of view.
